title: Research Project in Molecular & Cell Biology

prerequisites.text: MCB3025F or MCB3026F (or concurrent registration in MCB3023S or MCB3024S).

outline: Groups of students select and perform a research project two afternoons per week by arrangement. The work is written up in the form of a research paper. This course replaces practical classes for all third-year second semester MCB courses. All MCB majors must complete this course during the second semester.
lecture_times: Two afternoons per week, by arrangement.
